title: Few-Shot 3D Face Generation via a Controllable Diffusion Model Guided by Text and Images
summary: ControlFace generates computer-graphics-friendly 3D faces from text and image guidance using a controllable diffusion model trained with few-shot 3D facial assets.

title: UniFaceGAN: High-Quality 3D Face Editing With a Unified Latent Space
summary: UniFaceGAN builds a unified latent space for high-quality 3D facial editing, supporting stylization, point-based drag manipulation, and local blending.

title: DreamPBR: Text-driven High-Resolution SVBRDF Generation with Multimodal Guidance
summary: DreamPBR generates high-resolution physically based materials and SVBRDF parameter maps from text and multimodal controls.

title: Dual-Process Watermarked Diffusion: Integrating Watermarking With Denoising in Point Clouds
summary: DPWD embeds robust watermarks into diffusion models for point cloud generation, protecting model ownership while preserving generation quality.

title: Implanting Robust Watermarks in Latent Diffusion Models for Video Generation
summary: Stable Video Signature integrates watermarking into latent diffusion video generation with temporal consistency and robustness against attacks.

title: Polarization fingerprint for microalgae classification
summary: This work uses Mueller-matrix-based polarization fingerprints and machine learning to classify microalgae by physically meaningful polarization parameters.
